title: lindsaea virescens var. virescens
intro: Lindsaea virescens var. virescens, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lindsaeaceae. It is a rare, terrestrial fern native to Australia, characterized by its vibrant green, leathery fronds and robust rhizome. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health.
